_comment: Fake ValueCommerce advertiser EC Order Report API XML response (mixed status, two publisher sites, two programmes/PIDs). Element names are illustrative pending live verification; the adapter reads candidate tag names defensively. No real credentials or account data.
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Result>
  <Transactions>
    <Transaction>
      <transactionId>EC-20001</transactionId>
      <pid>5001</pid>
      <programName>Acme Direct Store</programName>
      <sid>9100</sid>
      <siteName>BestDeals JP</siteName>
      <approvalStatus>a</approvalStatus>
      <amount>12000</amount>
      <reward>600</reward>
      <currency>JPY</currency>
      <clickDate>2026-05-01 09:00:00</clickDate>
      <orderDate>2026-05-01 09:20:00</orderDate>
      <confirmationDate>2026-05-05 10:00:00</confirmationDate>
    </Transaction>
    <Transaction>
      <transactionId>EC-20002</transactionId>
      <pid>5001</pid>
      <programName>Acme Direct Store</programName>
      <sid>9100</sid>
      <siteName>BestDeals JP</siteName>
      <approvalStatus>a</approvalStatus>
      <amount>8000</amount>
      <reward>400</reward>
      <currency>JPY</currency>
      <clickDate>2026-05-01 11:00:00</clickDate>
      <orderDate>2026-05-01 11:30:00</orderDate>
      <confirmationDate>2026-05-06 10:00:00</confirmationDate>
    </Transaction>
    <Transaction>
      <transactionId>EC-20003</transactionId>
      <pid>5001</pid>
      <programName>Acme Direct Store</programName>
      <sid>9200</sid>
      <siteName>CouponHub JP</siteName>
      <approvalStatus>p</approvalStatus>
      <amount>5500</amount>
      <reward>275</reward>
      <currency>JPY</currency>
      <clickDate>2026-05-02 14:00:00</clickDate>
      <orderDate>2026-05-02 14:10:00</orderDate>
    </Transaction>
    <Transaction>
      <transactionId>EC-20004</transactionId>
      <pid>5001</pid>
      <programName>Acme Direct Store</programName>
      <sid>9200</sid>
      <siteName>CouponHub JP</siteName>
      <approvalStatus>c</approvalStatus>
      <amount>3200</amount>
      <reward>160</reward>
      <currency>JPY</currency>
      <clickDate>2026-05-03 16:00:00</clickDate>
      <orderDate>2026-05-03 16:25:00</orderDate>
      <confirmationDate>2026-05-07 09:00:00</confirmationDate>
      <rejectReason>Customer cancelled the order</rejectReason>
    </Transaction>
    <Transaction>
      <transactionId>EC-20005</transactionId>
      <pid>5002</pid>
      <programName>Acme Outlet</programName>
      <sid>9100</sid>
      <siteName>BestDeals JP</siteName>
      <approvalStatus>i</approvalStatus>
      <amount>20000</amount>
      <reward>1000</reward>
      <currency>JPY</currency>
      <clickDate>2026-05-04 08:00:00</clickDate>
      <orderDate>2026-05-04 08:40:00</orderDate>
      <confirmationDate>2026-05-08 10:00:00</confirmationDate>
      <invoiceDate>2026-06-01 00:00:00</invoiceDate>
    </Transaction>
  </Transactions>
</Result>
